flavorText: War clerics embody divine battle mastery and empower allies at pivotal moments.

features.description: Gain proficiency with heavy armor and martial weapons.
When you take the Attack action, you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier per long rest.
As Channel Divinity, when you miss an attack roll, you can add +10 to the roll.
When an ally within 30 feet misses an attack roll, you can use your reaction to grant +10 to that roll via Channel Divinity.
Once on each of your turns when you hit with a weapon attack, deal extra weapon damage of your deity's type.
You gain resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical weapons.

war-domain-bonus-proficiency.summary: Start ready for a frontline battle-priest style with sturdier equipment expectations.

war-domain-war-priest.summary: Turn martial momentum into extra weapon pressure during the rounds that matter most.
war-domain-war-priest.description: War Priest helps the domain feel like a genuine battle cleric instead of a caster wearing armor. It rewards stepping into weapon range and staying involved in physical offense.

war-domain-guided-strike.summary: Invoke divine certainty to turn an important attack into a much more reliable hit.

war-domain-war-gods-blessing.summary: Use divine warcraft to help an ally land the attack that matters.

war-domain-divine-strike.summary: Add extra weapon damage so the domain’s martial identity stays real as levels rise.

war-domain-avatar-of-battle.summary: You become much harder to overwhelm in the middle of a brutal melee.
war-domain-avatar-of-battle.description: Avatar of Battle is the late-game payoff for the heavily armored war-priest fantasy. It should read as a real survivability jump, not only a line of resistance text.
